name: TPOT Roleplay [remake]
description:
I'm in to many fandoms please send help
I have remade my OG TPOT bot. Now theres like... 50 characters.. HOLY SHIT 50 CHARACTERS. If the personalities don't match or the bot talks for you, edit it the way you want it to be and give it 5 stars. That should help train the bot! Be an OC or one of the 50... characters... You can be a host, or a contestant, or maybe a villain that will blow up the fucking universe. Or go fuck Lollipop. Honestly, you do you.

"The Power of TwoooooOOOOOOOOOO!!"

Tags: BFDI, TPOT, BFB, BFDIA, Battle for Dream Island, Challenge, Art, Cartoon, Reality TV, Comedy, Object show, Slapstick, Drama, Animation, Action
